title: Feature List for Long-Run Projects
description: Machine-readable state of features in a long-running project. Pairs with PROBLEMS.md (bugs) and init.sh (health check) as the standard harness for long-run projects. See principles/27-feature-tracking.md for full context.

id.description: Unique feature identifier in feat-NNN format

description.description: What this feature does in user-facing terms

dependencies.description: Feature IDs that must be 'done' before this one can start. Empty array if no dependencies.

status.description: Current implementation state. WIP=1 invariant: only one feature may have status='in-progress' at any time.

evidence.description: When status='done': references to L1 (syntax/static), L2 (runtime/tests), L3 (system/e2e) artifacts proving the feature works. When status='blocked': what blocks it (PROBLEMS.md entry id, external dependency, etc).
